utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each item is fully detailed: (1) property includes address, price, type, features, and closing_date; (2) financing includes provider, approved_amount, interest_rate, amortization, down_payment, monthly_payment_est, and validity; (3) legal_services includes package_id, included_services, estimated_cost, and representative; (4) moving_services includes service_id, included_services, special_items, estimated_cost, and coordinator; (5) setup_services covers both internet and utilities with provider, plan, installation_date, equipment, setup_costs, and monthly_rate; (6) total_budget includes cost breakdown with totals. All required fields are fully specified with details and costs.
